analysis.stakeholders: Senior leadership, engineering partners, customer success, cross-functional matrix org
fitReasons: Currently building agentic AI platform at JPMC — hands-on GenAI/LLM product leadership is the core requirement
Designed RAG pipeline over 45M+ documents — directly relevant to conversational AI knowledge retrieval
Proven ability to evangelize AI vision with senior leadership and drive execution across matrix organizations
15+ years PM experience well exceeds the 8+ year requirement
Track record of creating innovative products that delivered measurable customer and business outcomes at scale
gaps: No direct chat/voice assistant product experience — JPMC work is search/ranking rather than conversational
No fintech SMB or QuickBooks domain experience — will need to learn customer success context
analysis.strategy: Lead with JPMC agentic AI as the #1 proof point — Ili is building exactly the kind of AI-powered platform Intuit wants. Frame the RAG pipeline as foundational to conversational experiences. Emphasize the 'reimagine' mandate — Ili has done 0-to-1 AI product work in a regulated, high-stakes environment.

subtitles.jpmc: Agentic AI platform – LLM-powered search, RAG pipeline, and workflow automation for 7,000+ users
subtitles.yahoo: Product strategy and cross-functional leadership across targeting infrastructure at 20B+ daily scale
subtitles.newrelic: SaaS billing and provisioning systems during hypergrowth
subtitles.conversant: Tag management and cross-product integration at scale

resumeData.summary: Principal-level Product leader with 15+ years building AI-powered platforms and data-driven products at scale. Currently leading agentic AI platform development at JPMorgan Chase, delivering LLM-powered search, RAG retrieval over 45M+ documents, and automated workflows to 7,000+ users – reducing time-to-insight 40-60%. Proven track record of creating bold product vision, evangelizing with senior leadership, and driving execution across matrix organizations. At Yahoo, owned $500M+ annual revenue across targeting infrastructure, demonstrating deep experience translating customer behavior data into measurable business outcomes. Passionate about reimagining customer experiences through GenAI and cross-functional product leadership.
